creator: peter@vereshagin.org
text:
I have an application (PHP.pm) that requires the sapi libphp5.so library to be
built and installed.

Fix: I think that is possible with tthe patch supplied.
YMMV about -install target(s)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: # portinstall lang/php5
# perl -MCPAN -e 'install PHP'
